title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding models and agents such as Claude Code, Codex, and Pi as interchangeable workers. It enables workflow routing where one agent can plan a task, hand it to Claude Code for implementation, then route the output to Codex for review, with governance and cross-device session support.
writeup: The video covers Omnigent, a meta-harness that orchestrates multiple coding models and agents, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi, treating them as interchangeable workers. It demonstrates workflow routing in which one agent plans a task, hands implementation to Claude Code, and routes the output to Codex for review, with governance and cross-device session support. The takeaway is a single layer above individual coding agents that assigns each step to whichever model fits, keeping a human in the loop. This matters because it positions coding agents as modular components rather than competing standalone tools.
